content: Hi Kushal! Nice to meet you! How can I assist you today? Do you have any questions or need help with something in particular?
I want to build a chat bot for official use where a bot personal assistant will be placed in the reception and it responds to voice or text inquiries.

That's an interesting project, Kushal! Building a chatbot for official use can be a great way to enhance customer experience and streamline communication. To get started, I'll need to know a bit more about your requirements. Can you please provide me with some details? 1. What is the primary purpose of this chatbot? e.g., answering general queries, providing information, booking appointments, etc. 2. Who will be interacting with the chatbot? e.g., visitors, employees, customers 3. Will there be any specific features or integrations required? e.g., calendar integration, CRM integration, voice recognition, etc. 4. Do you have a preferred platform or development framework in mind? e.g., Rasa, Dialogflow, Microsoft Bot Framework, etc. 5. What is the expected volume of interactions with the chatbot? e.g., low, moderate, high Once I have this information, I can provide you with more tailored guidance and recommendations for building your chatbot. How does that sound, Kushal?
so, what is my name again?
repeat word for word for what I had said that I wanted to build. exactly like me
You said: "I want to build a chat bot for official use where a bot personal assistant will be placed in the reception and it responds to voice or text inquiries."
